Class HibernatePointStorage

java.lang.Object
sadnex.web.storage.HibernatePointStorage
All Implemented Interfaces:
Closeable, AutoCloseable, PointStorage
@Named("hibernatePointStorage") @ApplicationScoped public class HibernatePointStorage extends Object implements PointStorage
CDI-бин. Нужен для доступа к точкам из БД. Настройка в META-INF/persistence.xml.
Author:
s4dnex
